name: Char-Broiled Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Large fresh shrimp - Peeled and deveined, tails intact
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 13 X 9 X 2 inch baking dish, combine olive oil and remaining ingredients; stir well.
2. Add shrimp, stirring gently.
3. Cover and marinate in refrigerator for at least 8 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove shrimp from marinade using a slotted spoon; reserve marinade.
5. Place shrimp on water-soaked skewers.
6. Grill over medium hot coals 3 to 4 minutes on each side, basting frequently with marinade. Do not over cook.
8 servings.
